title: pterocarpus thyrsiflorus
intro: Pterocarpus thyrsiflorus, also known as the Indian red sandalwood or red sandalwood, is a deciduous tree native to India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, as well as its use as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Pterocarpus thyrsiflorus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting wound healing, among others. The tree's heartwood can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
